top_signals.title: Taiwan says it has not been told by US of arms sales delays
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said following a summit with China’s Xi Jinping in Beijing last week that he was undecided on whether to approve it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Credit Entry Points Incredibly Attractive: Steinbach
top_signals.summary: Margaret Steinbach, fixed income director at Capital Group, and Warren Pierson, co-chief investment officer of the Baird Funds, join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Junk debt is beating just about everything else in fixed-income markets after surging yields wiped out gains on most other bonds. Yet with high-yield credit spreads near two-decade lows, investor unease is building. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New strategic bitcoin reserve bill drops 1 million BTC purchase target, adds 20-year lockup period
top_signals.summary: The bill would require quarterly public proof-of-reserve disclosures and third-party audits of government bitcoin holdings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
